pre_game.message: Hey, I'm I — nice to meet you. First time in this kind of game? I'm hoping to win for my family; what brings you here?
Nice to meet you, I — yeah, first time. I'm here to win for my family and the people I care about; they’re counting on me.
I hear you — same here. Who in your family are you playing for? Maybe we can watch each other’s back during the game.
I'm playing for my mom and little sister — they really need the help. Watching each other's backs sounds smart; let's look out for one another.
I appreciate that — we'll watch each other's backs. How old is your sister, and what would winning do for them?
She’s nine — winning would cover rent and my mom’s medical bills, get her school supplies and give us some breathing room and stability.
I'm really sorry to hear that — I'm with you; we'll stick together and do everything we can. Anything I can do right now to help?
Thanks — just stick with me during the game, call out any deals others offer, and be ready to back me in votes/choices; I’ll do the same for you.
Absolutely — you can count on me. I’ll call out offers, flag anything shady, and back you in votes; let’s watch each other’s backs.
Thanks — I appreciate it. I'll do the same; let's stay alert, call out deals, and stick together.
Right — let's stay sharp and watch each other's backs; call out anything weird and I'll back you in votes.
Sounds good — I’ll do the same. Keep me posted on anything suspicious and I’ll call it out.
Will do — I’ll flag anything suspicious right away; let’s watch each other and win this.
Thanks — I’ll do the same; stay sharp and let’s win this together.
Thanks — let’s stay sharp and win this together.
Thanks — I’m with you. Let’s stay sharp and win this together.
You got it — we’ll make smart moves and watch each other’s backs. Ready when you are.
Ready — let’s do this. Stick close, call out anything off, and I’ve got your back.
Thanks — I’ve got your back too; let’s stay close, watch for deals, and call out anything off.
Thanks — I appreciate it. I’ll stick close, watch for anything weird, and back you when it matters.
Thanks — I’ve got your back too; let’s stick together and win this.
